headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 26, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 17-1 victory, while the Seattle Mariners rallied to defeat the St. Louis Cardinals 11-9. The Toronto Blue Jays took down the Cleveland Guardians 5-3, and the San Francisco Giants secured a 6-2 win over the Miami Marlins. The Atlanta Braves also had a strong performance, defeating the Philadelphia Phillies 6-2.

Injuries have impacted several teams, with the Los Angeles Angels placing Logan O'Hoppe on the 10-day injured list due to a left wrist fracture. The Chicago Cubs have also been affected, placing Riley Martin on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 24, 2026, due to left elbow inflammation. Other teams have also reported injuries, including the Detroit Tigers, Cleveland Guardians, New York Yankees, Cincinnati Reds, and Toronto Blue Jays.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place, including the Toronto Blue Jays acquiring Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for Ty Cummings, while the Chicago Cubs acquired Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash. The Houston Astros traded Braden Shewmake to the New York Yankees for Wilmy Sanchez.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rout Orioles 17-1**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 17-1 victory. Willson Contreras led the Red Sox offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Come From Behind to Defeat Cardinals 11-9**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners rallied to secure an 11-9 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, overcoming a late deficit to secure the win. Nathan Church led the Mariners' offense with 2 home runs and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Take Down Guardians 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5-3 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs. Kevin Gausman earned the win, while Louis Varland secured the save.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Marlins in 6-2 Victory**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 6-2 win over the Miami Marlins, with Casey Schmitt leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs. Robbie Ray pitched 5 strong innings for the Marlins, striking out 4 and allowing 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Take Down Orioles 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 5-3 victory over the Baltimore Orioles in their latest matchup. Impact hitters for the Red Sox included Willson Contreras and Ceddanne Rafaela, while Gunnar Henderson and Samuel Basallo stood out for the Orioles.

top_news.title: **Braves Take Down Phillies in 6-2 Thriller**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves secured a 6-2 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Ronald Acuña Jr. and Matt Olson leading the charge for the Braves. Kyle Schwarber and Aaron Nola had notable performances for the Phillies.

top_news.title: **Logan O'Hoppe Sidelined with Left Wrist Fracture**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels catcher Logan O'Hoppe has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left wrist fracture. The injury occurred on April 26, 2026.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in a trade for cash. MacIver joins the Blue Jays' lineup.
